editor.rationale: Substantive concerns across reviewer roles; expect a second review round.

concerns: Only k=2 trials available; heterogeneity and publication-bias diagnostics are underpowered.
Prediction interval not definable for k<3; flag as boundary condition.
Per-domain RoB 2.0 summary not attached to the included-trials table.
Pooled 0.85 diverges from Modi 2022 benchmark (HR 0.51 [0.40, 0.64]); Discussion should reconcile explicitly.
k<3 - clinical meaningfulness (MCID, NNT) cannot be grounded in pooled evidence.
DL estimator under-estimates τ² for k<10; add REML/Paule-Mandel sensitivity.
Effect not translated into absolute-risk difference / NNT for shared decision.
QoL / PROs not reported by any included trial; add a PRO secondary outcome where source-trial data permits.
